home.features: Features - What you can do with DYA Studio
home.customizeKeymaps: Customize keymaps with a slightly easier UI, equivalent to ZMK Studio.
home.configureTrackball: Configure trackball sensitivity, auto layer switching and various input processor settings.
home.checkBattery: Check battery consumption history stored on the device.
home.nameBLEConnections: Name BLE connection targets and unpair them.
home.changeSettings: Change various settings such as the time to enter sleep mode.
home.seeQASection: See also below Q&A section for more details.
home.dya2Description: Next generation DYA keyboard, 60% split, standard row-staggered layout.
home.qCanISourceCode: Q: Can I get source code of DYA Studio?
home.aClosedSource: A: No, for now. DYA Studio is currently closed source to avoid people relying on my heavily customized zmk-fork. If you have feedback or feature request, please complaint on X with
home.qPlanToMigrate: Q: Are there plan to migrate the ZMK fork to ZMK v0.4.0?
home.aWillingButNotSoon: A: Yes, I'm willing but not soon...
home.qKeyboardSupport: Q: Can my keyboard support DYA Studio?
home.aKeyboardSupportYes: A: Yes, you can use the keymap feature without any modification with your ZMK keyboard.
home.aKeyboardSupportAlso: You can also support other features by using cormoran's ZMK fork and cormoran's ZMK modules, although it's not suggested considering compatibility and maintainability.
home.warningText: cormoran's ZMK fork is very experimental, optimized for DYA keyboards and may contain unstable or breaking changes. Use at your own risk. In rare cases, it may cause malfunction or damage to your keyboard hardware.

battery.title: Battery Status
battery.batteryHistoryFeatureWarning: Battery history feature is not stable for now. Please consider
battery.beCarefulRecordingInterval: If you use battery history feature, be careful about recording interval, if history is recorded too frequently, flush drive might reach to its hardware limit soon.
battery.batteryHistoryNotAvailable: Battery history subsystem is not available for your keyboard.
battery.makeSureFirmwareHas: Make sure your firmware has the
battery.noBatteryHistoryAvailable: No battery history available. Connect keyboard to view battery history.
battery.batteryHistoryInfo: Battery history is stored in keyboard firmware. History recording interval is determined by the firmware.

ble.title: BLE Connections
ble.bleNotAvailable: BLE management subsystem is not available for your keyboard.
ble.makeSureFirmwareHas: Make sure your firmware has the
ble.areYouSureUnpair: Are you sure you want to unpair this device?
ble.changingOutputPriorityMayDisconnect: Changing the output priority may disconnect DYA Studio from your keyboard.
ble.youWillNeedReconnect: You will need to reconnect manually after the change.

trackball.title: Trackball Settings
trackball.description: Adjust sensitivity and behavior via runtime input processor
trackball.runtimeInputProcessorNotAvailable: Runtime input processor subsystem is not available for your keyboard.
trackball.makeSureFirmwareHas: Make sure your firmware has the
trackball.noRuntimeInputProcessorFound: No runtime input processor found. Make sure your firmware has the runtime input processor module enabled.
trackball.configureWhichLayersProcessorActive: Configure which layers this processor is active on
trackball.processorActiveAllLayers: Processor is active on all layers
trackball.rotateInputMountingAngles: Rotate input for different mounting angles
trackball.tempLayerDescription: Temporarily switch to a layer when specific input is detected
trackball.axisSnapDescription: Snap scrolling to axis when movement exceeds threshold
trackball.axisSnappingDescription: Constrain movement to a single axis for precision scrolling
trackball.axisInversionDescription: Reverse the direction of X or Y axis movement
trackball.xyToScrollDescription: Map X/Y movement to horizontal/vertical scroll
trackball.codeMappingDescription: Transform trackball movement into different input types
trackball.thresholdDescription: Threshold for unsnapping from the locked axis
trackball.activationDelayDescription: Delay before activating layer when trackball moves
trackball.deactivationDelayDescription: Delay before deactivating layer when trackball stops

settings.title: Settings
settings.settingsNotAvailable: Settings RPC subsystem is not available for your keyboard.
settings.makeSureFirmwareHas: Make sure your firmware has the
settings.idleTimeoutDescription: Time before keyboard enters idle mode

customSubsystems.securityNoticeText: Please do not connect to an unreliable author's web page. Only proceed if you trust the keyboard firmware author. External pages may request sensitive permissions or send data to third-party servers.
customSubsystems.noWebUIForSubsystem: No web UI available for this subsystem.
customSubsystems.noCustomSubsystems: No custom subsystems available. Custom subsystems are provided by the keyboard firmware.
customSubsystems.additionalFeaturesDescription: Custom subsystems are additional features provided by your keyboard firmware author. Web UI links open external pages supplied by the firmware metadata.
customSubsystems.title: Custom Subsystems
customSubsystems.description: Available custom firmware subsystems and their web interfaces

healthCheck.title: Health Check
healthCheck.connectKeyboardRunDiagnostics: Connect your keyboard to run hardware diagnostics. This will check communication with all components and report any issues.
healthCheck.connectInfo: Connect your keyboard to run hardware diagnostics. This will check communication with all components and report any issues.

connectionNotice.dataCollectionDescription: DYA Studio collects your keyboard name for usage analysis purposes. However, no other keyboard data is sent to any servers. All of your keyboard configurations, keymaps, or settings are handled locally.
connectionNotice.bleNotSupported: Your browser does not support Web Bluetooth API. Please use a
connectionNotice.bleDiscoveryNote: BLE device discovery on non-Linux system requires cormoran's ZMK fork + press the studio unlock key on your keyboard.
connectionNotice.serialNotSupported: Your browser does not support Web Serial API. Please use a
connectionNotice.noteWebSerialNotAvailable: Note that web serial is not available on mobile devices.
connectionNotice.howToDiscoverKeyboard: How to Discover your Keyboard via BLE
connectionNotice.pressStudioUnlockKey: Press the studio unlock key on your keyboard for non-linux systems.
connectionNotice.cormoranZMKForkRequired: cormoran's ZMK fork is also required for BLE device discovery on non-Linux systems.
connectionNotice.tryTheseSteps: Try these steps: make sure the keyboard is in pairing mode, try pressing the studio unlock key, or disconnect other Bluetooth devices.

unlockPrompt.keyboardLockedMessage: Your keyboard's ZMK Studio is locked. Please unlock it to continue editing your keymap.
unlockPrompt.lookForNotification: Look for a notification or LED indication that confirms unlock
unlockPrompt.step2: Look for a notification or LED indication that confirms unlock
unlockPrompt.unlockKeyCombinationNote: The unlock key combination is typically configured in your ZMK keymap. Check your firmware configuration if you're unsure.

keymap.title: Keymap
keymap.connectKeyboardToEdit: Connect your keyboard to edit keymaps
keymap.keyboardLockedMessage: Your keyboard's ZMK Studio is locked. Please unlock it to continue editing your keymap.
keymap.unlockKeyCombination: Unlock key combination is typically configured in your ZMK keymap.
keymap.areYouSureDiscard: Are you sure you want to discard all changes?
keymap.areYouSureDeleteLayer: Are you sure you want to delete this layer?
keymap.runtimeSensorRotationNotAvailable: Runtime sensor rotation subsystem is not available for your keyboard.
keymap.rotaryEncoderNotAvailable: Rotary encoder configuration will not be displayed.
keymap.youCanEnableByApplying: You can enable the feature by applying:
keymap.keymapInstructionsConnected: Click on a key to modify its binding. Modified keys are highlighted in green and show the original binding on hover. Use the Reset All button to discard all changes.
keymap.keymapInstructionsDisconnected: Connect your keyboard to edit keymaps. Click on a key to modify its binding.
keymap.osLayoutTooltipItem1: This setting only affects the visual key labels in DYA Studio web UI.
keymap.osLayoutTooltipItem2Prefix: Changing this does not update any firmware setting. The keyboard is
keymap.osLayoutTooltipItem2Suffix: regardless of this setting. Please change the layout setting in your OS if needed. For MacOS, USB connection is always detected as US and cannot be changed for now.
keymap.osLayoutTooltipItem3: The selection is saved in your browser's local storage for now.

batteryHistory.restartIndicator: Dashed lines with ⟲ indicate keyboard restarts

sensorRotation.valueSavedRealTime: The value is saved in real-time upon selection for now.
sensorRotation.rotaryEncoderNotAvailable: Rotary encoder configuration will not be displayed.
sensorRotation.youCanEnableByApplying: You can enable the feature by applying:
sensorRotation.tapTimeRequirement: For scroll or mouse move, tap time need to be > behavior-input-two-axis's trigger-period-ms (default 16ms).
